prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e1baa8a4`.
codex_response:
Implemented `e1baa8a4` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: the input is a full tiling of solid rectangles arranged on a macro row/column lattice, and the output is that macro-grid compressed to one cell per rectangle. I used the summary hint because it matched all official examples exactly; no `notes.md` correction was needed, and no new primitive in `arc2/dsl_ext.py` was necessary.

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e1baa8a4/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e1baa8a4/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e1baa8a4/generator.py). The verifier extracts row-strip starts and column-strip starts by comparing full rows/columns to their predecessors, then samples the top-left cell of each macro block. The generator samples a recoverable macro-grid with distinct adjacent row/column signatures, then expands it into solid rectangles with varying row heights and column widths, which matches the official family including occasional hidden boundaries caused by repeated colors.

Validation passed end-to-end: official verifier `5/5`, generated verifier `1000/1000`, and the previews looked on-family. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e1baa8a4/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e1baa8a4/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e1baa8a4/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e1baa8a4/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e1baa8a4/previews/preview_03.png).
